title: Spunky Boost
description: The Best Modpack to optimize PojavLauncher's performance! Available in all versions
body:
Do you face lag or crashes while playing Minecraft on PojavLauncher? Don’t worry! The **Spunky Boost Modpack** is here to fix that. It’s made to make your Minecraft game run faster and smoother, even on slow devices.

The Spunky Boost Modpack is a group of special mods that help Minecraft run better on PojavLauncher. It’s lightweight, meaning it won’t slow down your device but will make the game run much smoother.

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eaf23726a62c7c004ca58006fa258b1fd6aeac6.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

---

## Features

1. **No More Lag**  
   It makes the game run faster, so you don’t get stuck or lag during gameplay.

2. **Fixes Crashes**  
   It helps prevent the game from crashing, giving you a better experience.

3. **Works on Low-End Devices**  
   Even if your device isn’t powerful, this modpack helps it run Minecraft without issues.

4. **Easy to Use**  
   You don’t need to be an expert. Just install the modpack, and you’re good to go!

---

[![ggservers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6627940f1a86e330af62e3e1268b4a3e897f380_0.webp)](https://ggservers.com/billing/aff.php?aff=6966)

## 🛠️ Steps to Install Modrinth Modpacks

### 1. **Download the Modpack**
   - Visit the [Modrinth website](https://modrinth.com).  
   - Search for the modpack you want to install.  
   - Click on the **Download** button to get the `.zip` or `.mrpack` file of the modpack.

---

### 2. **Set Up PojavLauncher**
   - Open PojavLauncher on your device.  
   - Make sure it is updated to the latest version for better compatibility.

---

### 3. **Create a New Minecraft Instance**
   - In PojavLauncher, go to **Settings** or **Manage Accounts** and log in if you haven’t already.  
   - Create a new Minecraft instance for the version required by the modpack.

---

### 4. **Install the Modpack**
   - Locate the `.zip` or `.mrpack` file you downloaded.  
   - Extract the contents of the file using a file manager or unzip tool.  
   - Copy the mods, resource packs, and configuration files into the correct folders in your Minecraft directory:
     - Mods → `/.minecraft/mods/`  
     - Resource Packs → `/.minecraft/resourcepacks/`  
     - Config Files → `/.minecraft/config/`  

---

### 5. **Launch the Game**
   - Open PojavLauncher and select the Minecraft instance you created.  
   - Press **Play** to start the game with the installed modpack.  

---

## 🧪 Tested and Approved

Spunky Boost Modpack has been tested by players on different devices, and the results are amazing. Whether you’re building, exploring, or fighting mobs, everything runs better with this modpack.
